summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a magical 10‑03 show, delivering classic Dead magic with crystal‑clear audio.
review: Fans rave about this recording as one of the most beautiful and well‑captured performances from the era, praising both the music and the audio fidelity. The set is described as “PRIMO” and listeners repeatedly call it a quick fix of Grateful Dead magic. No specific performance issues are noted, indicating a consistently strong show.

ai_rating.rationale: All but one reviewer gave five stars and highlighted both the music and recording quality; the lone low rating appears anomalous, so overall the show and tape are judged outstanding.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers explicitly praise the audio as excellent/beautiful with no complaints about muddiness or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners describe the set as a “PRIMO” 10‑03 performance, indicating strong flow and overall enjoyment of the entire show.
